overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a mountain trail overlooking a scenic river valley. The character descends a dirt path with steep rocky cliffs on the left and expansive views of forests and a winding river below, eventually revealing a horse-drawn wagon in the valley.

events.description: character begins walking forward along the mountain trail
camera pans right to view the rocky cliff face before returning to forward facing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the mountain trail overlooking the valley, briefly glancing at the rock wall to the right

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face running alongside the left side of the trail
tall cliff wall covered in dense pine forest across the valley
river winding through the valley floor below
scattered pine trees on the right slope of the mountain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a scenic overlook of a vast mountain valley. The character stands on a dirt trail with a steep rocky cliff immediately to the left and begins walking forward. The camera briefly pans right to show a rocky outcrop before returning to face the distant forested cliffs across the valley. The winding river is visible below, and the area is completely devoid of other people or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending mountain trail with valley view

events.description: horse-drawn wagon becomes visible in the valley below

agents.ego_description: continuing the descent along the trail with the valley floor becoming more visible ahead

notable_agents.action: stationary horse-drawn wagon visible in the valley grass below

entered.detail: wooden wagon with horses parked on the grassy valley floor
grassy flat area at the bottom of the valley becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The character continues descending the mountain trail, with the left rocky cliff still running alongside. The view opens up to reveal more of the valley floor, and approximately halfway through the segment, a horse-drawn wagon becomes visible in the grass below. The distant forested cliffs remain visible across the valley while the river appears to recede slightly into the distance as the descent continues.

agents.ego_description: descending toward the valley floor with the wagon now clearly visible ahead and to the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon stationary in the grassy valley below

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character continues the descent along the left cliff face toward the valley floor. The horse-drawn wagon is now clearly visible and appears to shift to the right side of the frame as the camera moves forward. The distant forested cliffs fade into the background while scattered trees on the valley floor become more prominent in the mid-ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descent from a high mountain overlook down toward a populated valley floor. It begins on a dirt trail beside a steep rocky cliff, with the camera panning right across a rocky outcrop before facing the vast, empty expanse of forested cliffs and a winding river below. As the character continues walking forward, the perspective opens up to reveal the valley floor, where a horse-drawn wagon gradually emerges from the grass. The scene then shifts as the descent progresses, causing the distant cliffs to recede and the wagon to move toward the right side of the frame. Finally, the camera approaches the valley floor, where the far-off mountains fade into the background and scattered mid-ground trees become the primary focus.
